must_detect.matched_text: Proposed Term Sheet: Strategic acquisition of 55% of Meridian Systems PCL (SET: MRDN) by Banyan Archipelago Capital Ltd., a Singapore SPV, with a subsequent mandatory tender offer under the Securities and Exchange Act (SEA) of Thailand.

Transaction Overview: Buyer to acquire 110,000,000 existing ordinary shares at THB 9.40 per share; consideration in cash; SPA and SHA to be executed; completion targeted within 90 days of signing; price adjustment via net debt/working capital true-up.

Financing: THB 700,000,000 bridge facility from Chao Phraya Capital Bank, facility account alias “CP-Bridge-2026,” with proceeds to be escrowed at Lotus Trust (Thailand) Ltd. under escrow ledger “Meridian-2026-Deal,” ref code LTT-8893; financial advisor: Sapphire Advisory Co., Ltd.

Use of Proceeds/Strategic Rationale: Post-acquisition, a private placement to raise THB 300,000,000 for capex and ERP upgrades; synergies in procurement and logistics; no change to dividend policy until FY2027.

Timeline/Fees: Signing targeted within 30 days; long-stop date 31 January 2027; break fee THB 20,000,000 if buyer fails to obtain financing; reverse break fee THB 12,000,000 if seller breaches exclusivity.

Access/Device Context (Target): Sirinapa accessed the VDR via Lenovo ThinkPad T14 asset tag MS-T14-0881, session reference VDR-TH-2197-BKK, corporate Teams handle “sirinapa.k,” and last file check-in at 15:30 ICT on 12 September 2026; meeting room booking: “Meridian Tower L18—Deal Desk.”
